places.name: Sobrino de Botin
places.description: The oldest restaurant in the world is this old-world Spanish eatery, still known for its suckling pig.

places.name: Palacio de Cristal
places.description: Madrid's romantically ornate crystal palace has been offering shelter to plants and art for over a century.

places.name: Templo de Debod
places.description: An ancient Egyptian temple in the middle of Madrid, Spain.

places.name: Atocha Station Tropical Garden
places.description: A lush indoor jungle fills this bustling Madrid transportation hub.

places.name: Chamberí Ghost Station
places.description: Abandoned for decades, trains still pass through the now-restored remains of one of Madrid's first metro stations.

places.name: Fountain of the Fallen Angel
places.description: Commonly acknowledged as the only public monument to the Devil himself.

places.name: Real Jardin Botanico
places.description: Over two centuries old and counting, Madrid's massive botanical garden contains one of Europe's only desert environments.

places.name: Secret Nun Cookies at Monasterio del Corpus Christi
places.description: Order cookies baked by cloistered nuns in a 400-year-old monastery.

places.name: Kiosko de Horchata Miguel y José
places.description: Madrid's last horchata kiosk is a blue-and-white beacon of refreshment.
